details.biography: James Wright is a London based actor who started working in film as a supporting artist in Flawless (2007) and as body double for Benedict Cumberbatch in Stuart a life backwards. Returning to film and TV in 2023, James has appeared in a wide range of projects from commercials to feature films in scripted and non scripted roles.
